subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one of Abdu'l-Baha! Thy detailed letter was perused with the utmost grief, regret, sorrow and pain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه مفصل شما بنهایت حزن و افسوس و غم و الم قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
